## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hypermode and GrowthX to discuss content performance, SEO strategy, and PR pitching best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [31 articles published; more ready for publication today](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [SEO performance strong despite data lag; impressions growing](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [PR pitching strategy focuses on newsworthiness, compelling headlines, and framing around industry trends](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Thought leadership content should address real industry challenges with unique insights and expert contributions](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and SEO

  - [31 articles published; several ready for publication today](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Performance metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
      - [Website: High impressions (exact number undisclosed), clicks slightly down](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
      - [CTR for thought leadership content improved, now on par with other categories](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
      - [Average position: 26 (considered decent, especially for thought leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Optimization strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
      - Ranking \#1 for "model optionality" but low search volume
      - [Updating metas, adding internal links, adjusting content when necessary](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [Exploring related keywords (e.g., "model agnostic") to boost traction](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

### PR Pitching Strategy

  - [Key elements for effective tech reporter pitches:](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Attention-grabbing, beat-relevant headline](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Clear newsworthy angle (why now? why important?)](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Framing against provocative industry trends (e.g., power shift, democratizing force)](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Insights reporters can claim as their analysis](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [Focus on themes like labor or power dynamics](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [Supporting materials: day-in-life demo, specific use cases, early data](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [Compelling founder quote](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Timing challenges due to "drip launch" process](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

### Thought Leadership Content

  - [Publish technically deep, well-structured content addressing real industry challenges](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Focus on unique insights and "hot takes" from internal experts and network](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Leverage notable figures for expert guides and borrowed authority](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Active promotion across LinkedIn and email drips](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Study peer and large tech company examples for structure and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sadira to research and share similar search terms to "model optionality" for potential content topics](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Jessica to review and potentially adjust this week's content topics based on search term findings](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Team to continue optimizing existing content (metas, internal linking, content adjustments)](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Jessica to compile PR pitch (optional: send to Mara/Matthew for review)](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Prepare for final sync next week; team to ensure all content is properly archived in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Maintain access to Notion for meeting notes and other resources](https://fathom.video/share/fHdWrz4L71LzQr4vsSVNt7TX8wRGvkUx?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
